welcome.title: Welcome to IdrisMans Transit – The Forwarding Agent of the World
welcome.p1: IdrisMans was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Île-de-France. In recent years, our company has developed and expanded its range of services to cover all aspects of the freight industry. Today, IdrisMans is a global service provider offering a comprehensive shipping and logistics portfolio.
welcome.p2: IdrisMans is an international freight forwarder specializing in multimodal and combined transport services. Also in the organization of international moving of goods, personal effects, all types of rolling vehicles such as motorized or static cargo, heavy “oversize” bulk and semi-bulk freight.
welcome.p3: Thanks to our network of corresponding agents located on the 5 continents, whether it involves sea, rail, land or air transport, we are able to manage departures and arrivals for you at your convenience with the best global companies. IdrisMans offers you a personalized service and concrete and continuous information throughout the journey from departure to arrival.
welcome.p4: In addition, IdrisMans carefully monitors the entire process of transporting your cargo. The establishment of all required customs formalities and assistance with customs clearance of your goods are taken care of by IdrisMans.

philosophy.title: At IdrisMans
philosophy.p1: We offer a virtual presence, with services available exclusively online. We guarantee the quality of our work remotely, and no physical appointment is necessary. In addition, thanks to our extensive network of agents who represent us, we are present in all ports and airports around the world.
philosophy.p2: We constantly strive to be recognized as leaders in excellence in international shipping services. Our mission is to offer our customers the best possible service, with a wide range of direct destinations.
philosophy.p3: Ask us for advice, we are here to help you every step of the way. Contact us easily and let us exceed your expectations with our unrivaled expertise.

about.meta_desc: About IdrisMans Transit – International Transport Agent since 2011.
about.trusted_banner: IDRISMANS TRANSIT, YOUR TRUSTED PARTNER FOR YOUR INTERNATIONAL SHIPMENTS
about.history_p1: IdrisMans was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Île-de-France. In recent years, our company has developed and expanded its range of services to cover all aspects of the freight industry. Today, IdrisMans is a global service provider offering a comprehensive shipping and logistics portfolio.
about.history_p2: We are an international freight forwarder specializing in multimodal and combined transport services, particularly operating on the France ↔ Rest of the World and EU ↔ Rest of the World corridors. We also excel in the organization of international moving of goods and the transport of all types of vehicles (Africa ↔ EU specialty).
about.history_p3: Thanks to our network of corresponding agents located on 5 continents, we manage your departures and arrivals at your convenience. Our commitment to quality, reliability and customer service has earned us the trust of many individuals and businesses around the world.
about.here_p1: At IdrisMans Transit, we understand that international logistics can seem complex. That's why we do our best to make it simple for our customers. We take care of all aspects of the shipping process, from collection to delivery, documentation and customs clearance, so our customers can focus on their core business.
about.here_p2: Whether you need air freight, ocean freight, or ground transportation services, our team has the expertise and experience to handle all your shipments. We are proud to offer exceptional customer service, 100% remote and without the need for a physical appointment, with a virtual presence that guarantees maximum efficiency.
about.here_p3: We are committed to providing reliable, efficient and cost-effective freight solutions. Contact us today to find out how we can support you.
about.objective_text: Helping individuals and businesses navigate the complex world of international logistics with innovative solutions and seamless customer service.
about.vision_text: To be recognized as a leader in shipping service excellence, modernizing and simplifying a traditionally complex industry.
about.mission_text: Changing the way people perceive international transit. We want to prioritize customer service, simplify pricing, and use our expertise to grow with you.
about.team1_bio: A specialist in international commercial freight, he supervises all import/export operations and manages relationships with our global logistics partners.
about.team2_bio1: Idriss founded IdrisMans in 2011 with the vision of creating a seamless and transparent international freight forwarding service. A specialist in corridors between Europe, Africa and the rest of the world, he has built a company renowned for its reliability.
about.team2_bio2: Its in-depth expertise in commercial freight and RoRo vehicle transport has enabled IdrisMans to become a key player for companies and individuals seeking tailor-made support.
about.team3_bio: Expert in customs procedures and import/export regulations, he guarantees the conformity of each shipment and ensures the fluidity of administrative formalities.
about.why_text: If problems arise, our team has the experience to find quick solutions. In addition, our vast network of partners allows us to operate anywhere in the world.

freight.intro_title: IdrisMans is the benchmark for major international brands for secure freight — billions of goods transported each year.
freight.intro_p1: With over two decades of experience, IdrisMans Transit has built a reputation as one of the most reliable freight forwarders in the world. We handle everything—from traditional ocean freight to complex project logistics—with the same level of care and precision our customers expect.
freight.intro_p2: Whether you are importing goods into France, exporting to global markets or managing regular flows of commercial freight, our team has the expertise and systems to make it happen.
freight.core_heading: Three essential things you should demand from your freight forwarder
freight.core_p: As a leading international freight forwarder, we are committed to providing ongoing support, strategy and solutions to establish the best long-term working relationship with our customers.
freight.experts_heading: Our experts handle everything from start to finish
freight.experts_intro: Our experienced network supports the full range of air and sea freight services:
freight.experts_p: At IdrisMans, we look at all options to find you the best transit solution. We guide you through the process and provide up-to-date recommendations to get the goods moved in the most efficient and quickest way.
freight.network_heading: A transportation network that covers the entire world
freight.network_p1: IdrisMans has an extensive global international transit network. There are, however, some destinations where the safety of goods and agents cannot be guaranteed — so we will not risk your reputation by serving these areas.
freight.network_p2: We are in daily contact with our global team of more than 125 experienced agents, to get you the best rates and personalized service.
freight.whereship_p1: Our goal is to build a lasting relationship with our customers. We consider ourselves logistics consultants — we seek to improve your supply chains and reduce costs.
freight.whereship_p2: With offices in France and Africa, and an extensive network of partners, we offer services to and from China, Singapore, Hong Kong, Vietnam, Japan, South Korea, Italy, Spain, Germany, and many more.
freight.globalnet_heading: Our global networks work for you
freight.globalnet_p1: In a global business, it's all about the relationships you build. Our agent network has been established for years through mutual trust and cooperation.
freight.globalnet_p2: In many parts of the world, strong relationships can mean preferential support — our contacts are leveraged for the benefit of our customers.
freight.testimonials_intro: We have moved tens of thousands of shipments. Our team has spent decades building strong relationships with our clients and refining every aspect of our process.

import_car.hero_title: SHIPPING YOUR VEHICLE HAS NEVER BEEN SO SIMPLE
import_car.hero_sub: Trusted by over 10,000 families and businesses for safe, affordable, and on-time vehicle transportation.
import_car.three_proven_methods_6c7891e4: Three proven ways to get your vehicle to your destination — choose the option that fits your schedule and budget.
import_car.your_vehicle_is_f05ad86e: Your vehicle is driven directly to the ship and secured for the journey. This is the most cost-effective and commonly used shipping method for standard vehicles. The vehicle must be emptied of all personal belongings.
import_car.your_vehicle_shares_f36aa026: Your vehicle shares a 40-foot container with other vehicles, which significantly reduces costs. Excellent protection against bad weather. Personal items may be placed inside the vehicle but are shipped at the owner's risk.
import_car.your_vehicle_has_b51ec499: Your vehicle has an entire container all to itself. Maximum protection and security — ideal for classic, luxury or high-value vehicles. You can also pack the container with household items next to your vehicle.
import_car.you_might_have_6fa66686: You might have these concerns about shipping your vehicle overseas
import_car.modern_shipping_methods_52613baa: Modern shipping methods and professional handling mean your vehicle is well protected throughout its journey. We provide a full condition report at origin so that any pre-existing damage is documented prior to loading.
import_car.customs_paperwork_import_0213ed65: Customs formalities, import declarations, compliance documents and quarantine requirements — we handle it all. You'll always know exactly what's needed and when, without getting bogged down in paperwork.
import_car.no_hidden_fees_ccd7747a: No hidden fees, no surprises. Your quote from IdrisMans is comprehensive — covering transportation, shipping, customs clearance and local delivery. We will clearly explain any potential additional costs up front.
import_car.the_international_vehicle_ba1e5344: The international vehicle shipping industry has invested heavily in safety systems, vessel design and vehicle securement technology. Millions of vehicles are shipped safely each year without incident.
import_car.all_vessels_used_d7d18b54: All vessels used by IdrisMans Transit are operated by reputable and internationally certified shipping companies. Your vehicle is registered, photographed and a condition report is generated at origin — providing you with documented proof of its condition before it boards the vessel.
import_car.we_also_offer_b54eeaf8: We also offer marine cargo insurance for complete peace of mind. Our team will advise you on the most appropriate level of cover for the value of your vehicle.
import_car.we_take_care_2e322190: We take care of the whole journey
import_car.we_arrange_collection_82e990dc: We arrange collection from your home, workplace or any designated address.
import_car.your_vehicle_is_32d01066: Your vehicle is delivered and registered at the departure terminal by our team.
import_car.a_full_condition_a452b17f: A complete condition report and photographs are taken before your vehicle enters the terminal.
import_car.your_vehicle_is_8f204fd8: Your vehicle is loaded and secured by experienced handlers under strict safety protocols.
import_car.we_notify_you_901c8884: We notify you of the ship's arrival and give you an estimated customs clearance time.
import_car.our_team_manages_b0ac1445: Our team manages all customs declarations, duties and MPI quarantine inspection processes.
import_car.your_vehicle_is_0d10a933: Your vehicle is collected from the terminal and prepared for final delivery.
import_car.delivered_to_your_1737627d: Delivered to your door — or collected from our depot at your convenience.
import_car.trusted_by_10_90068569: Trusted by over 10,000 families and businesses
import_car.a_big_thanks_56eaa698: "A big thank you to the team at IdrisMans Transit. They have just shipped my Triton from Perth to Wellington. If you want a completely stress free and reliable company these guys are the ones to use. Fantastic price and I have always been kept up to date when my Ute has arrived."
import_car.highly_professional_company_203e2ef2: "Very professional company that does what it says. I was extremely pleased with their efforts in helping me import my car to New Zealand recently. Highly recommended!"
import_car.shipped_our_vehicle_5cb008f3: "I shipped our vehicle from Brisbane to Auckland (Africa). The process was a breeze. The whole team was fantastic to deal with. Fast communication, relaying all the necessary information and very pleasant to deal with."
import_car.roll_on_roll_41853ab3: Roll on, Roll off requires vehicles to be completely empty — this is a strict requirement of shipping companies. Container shipping (shared or full container) allows personal items inside the vehicle; however, these are shipped entirely at your own risk and must be declared. High value items, dangerous goods or prohibited items should not be packaged.
import_car.it_completely_depends_a0a93426: This depends entirely on the terms of your contract with your finance company. Some lenders allow the vehicle to be exported while financing is still in progress; others require the loan to be settled first. We strongly recommend that you contact your lender directly and obtain written confirmation before booking your shipment.
import_car.for_registration_certificates_7ac2688c: For registration certificates, you can contact your state or territory transport department for a copy. If you cannot provide proof of the original purchase price, customs at destination will arrange an independent valuation of your vehicle (approximately AUD 300), which determines the customs value for the purposes of import valuation.
import_car.no_we_do_94130cc9: No, we do all this for you. Our team in New Zealand will work with Customs on your behalf to process the GST exemption request and ensure it is correctly applied to your import. All you need to do is provide the necessary documents when we ask for them.
import_car.this_is_possible_8437f240: This is possible at some international ports including Brisbane, Port Kembla, Melbourne and Adelaide. However, you will need a valid MSIC (Maritime Security Identification Card) to enter the port grounds yourself, or you will need to arrange an escort through us (escort fees apply). In most cases, organizing a tow truck through IdrisMans is simpler and more cost-effective.
import_car.no_you_can_166aab07: No, you can designate a friend or family member to hand over the car to our tow truck driver on your behalf. They will have to sign the collection documents. Please ensure the designated person has access to the vehicle keys and knows its location.
import_car.it_is_possible_859c0150: It is possible to leave a baby seat in a container shipment, but it is not recommended. Baby seats are typically installed with fabric and foam components that may fail quarantine inspections. If transported, they must be declared and are shipped at the owner's risk. We recommend removing and shipping them separately or replacing them at destination.
import_car.the_compliance_process_64de33e2: The compliance process is required for permanently imported vehicles and includes: testing of all safety features (seat belts, airbags, brakes, lights), a full interior and exterior inspection and, where applicable, emissions testing to confirm compliance with local standards. Our team can coordinate the compliance process and advise you on any changes that may be necessary.
import_car.if_your_vehicle_2ce01737: If your vehicle fails the MPI quarantine inspection, treatment is ordered by the Ministry of Primary Industries. Basic decontamination starts at around $135 + GST. Depending on the extent of contamination found — soil, plant matter, insects — the total cost can easily exceed $400 to $500. To avoid this additional expense and delay, make sure your vehicle (especially the chassis, wheel arches and engine compartment) is thoroughly cleaned before shipping.

import_vehicle.l_international_to_4f848917: RoRo Shipping to International from Africa
import_vehicle.no_we_do_417c7115: No, we do all of this for you, our team in New Zealand will work with customs on your behalf to do all of this for you.
import_vehicle.no_you_can_c631b69e: No, you can designate a friend or family member to drop off the car to us.
import_vehicle.no_you_can_14512ead: No, you can nominate anyone to collect the vehicle on your behalf. If you are claiming GST exemption, however, you will need to ensure that you are somewhere in Africa when the ship carrying your vehicle arrives in New Zealand. If you do not claim GST exemption and are happy to pay import tax, then you do not need to be in Africa and anyone can collect the car for you.
import_vehicle.you_can_but_4058ccf8: You can, but we do not recommend it and it is shipped strictly at your own risk. Roll on, Roll off shipping is designed strictly for the movement of empty vehicles, so if you choose to leave the baby seat inside, there is a good chance it will no longer be there upon arrival. If you want to be sure of having it in New Zealand, it's best to take it as excess baggage on the plane when you cross.
import_vehicle.compliance_is_a_32c817a9: Compliance is a very thorough and one-off process that your vehicle must go through before it can be registered for the first time in New Zealand. They test a number of safety features on your vehicle – seat belts, tire tread, brake pads, windshields, etc. – they strip the interior of the vehicle so that the actual structure of the vehicle can be inspected to ensure it has never been significantly damaged, and they test the emissions produced by your vehicle. Once this process is completed, you will receive a Certificate of Conformity and Warrant of Fitness (WOF) and you can register your vehicle.
import_vehicle.your_vehicle_needs_fc68753b: Your vehicle must be tested and inspected to ensure it meets Africa's safety and environmental standards set by their transport authority. Basically, they want to make sure your vehicle is fit to be on the road and isn't causing too much damage to the environment.

faq.q2: Why should I use a freight forwarding service?
faq.q3: What modes of transport do you offer?
faq.q4: Do you offer international freight services?
faq.q5: Can you handle customs clearance for my shipments?
faq.q6: How can I track my shipments?
faq.freight_forwarding_is_71ad8374: Freight forwarding is the process of organizing the shipment and transportation of goods from one location to another, ensuring they reach their destination efficiently and cost-effectively. A freight forwarder acts as an intermediary between the shipper and various transportation services.
faq.such_services_provide_5943d857: Such services provide expertise in logistics, customs clearance, and documentation. Benefits include saving time, reducing costs, and ensuring professional handling throughout the shipping process. Freight forwarders have established relationships with carriers and can negotiate better rates than individual shippers.
faq.we_offer_air_3da2d598: We offer air freight, ocean freight, road freight, and rail freight. Our team will work with you to determine the most suitable and cost-effective transportation option for your specific needs, taking into account factors such as cargo type, timeline, and budget.
faq.yes_we_specialize_c97c96bc: Yes, we specialize in international freight forwarding with experience handling shipments globally and to neighbouring countries. With over 125 experienced agents worldwide, we have the network and expertise to handle your international logistics needs.
faq.absolutely_we_have_75974bb2: Absolutely! We have a dedicated team of experts who are well-versed in customs regulations and procedures. We handle all customs clearance requirements, ensuring your shipments comply with all relevant laws and regulations, minimizing delays and avoiding costly penalties.
faq.you_can_access_08f05f18: You can access real-time tracking information through our online tracking system or by contacting our customer service team. We provide comprehensive tracking from collection through to final delivery, keeping you informed at every stage of the journey.
faq.it_depends_on_2c065915: It depends on the shipping method. Roll on, Roll off requires vehicles be completely empty — all personal items will need to be removed. Container shipping does allow you to place items inside your vehicle, as it provides additional security and privacy.
faq.there_are_three_050d31f6: There are three key reasons: (1) Theft risk — items left in vehicles during RoRo shipping are vulnerable to theft; (2) Shipping lines won't accept responsibility or declare items left inside vehicles; (3) It avoids legal complications at customs — undeclared goods can cause serious delays and penalties.
faq.it_completely_depends_3b215f8a: It completely depends on the conditions of your contract with your finance company. Contact your lender directly to confirm. Options include paying out the loan, taking a personal loan to pay it off, or refinancing with a lender that has more permissive export conditions.
faq.contact_your_department_6b65e084: Contact your department of transport for a copy of your registration certificate. For invoices, contact the dealership or create a typed bill of sale with supporting documentation (bank statements). Without proof of value, NZ customs will order a valuation which costs approximately AUD $300.
faq.no_we_do_5db5e6fc: No, we do all this for you. Our team over in NZ will work with customs on your behalf to do this all for you, making the process as seamless as possible.
faq.yes_this_is_a1e539a8: Yes, this is possible in Brisbane, Port Kembla, Melbourne, and Adelaide (requires an MSIC card or an escort fee/induction). Note that Port Kembla is approximately 100km from Sydney. In NZ, vehicles must undergo compliance before collection or driving.
faq.no_you_can_33c1202e: No, you can nominate a friend or family member to hand the car over to us. Just let us know in advance so we can arrange for the appropriate documentation to be provided to your nominee.
faq.it_is_possible_a0af101c: It is possible but not recommended. Baby seats are shipped at the owner's risk and are not covered by transit insurance. It is better to take the seat as plane luggage, which is generally allowed free of charge by most airlines.
faq.the_compliance_process_f4fc9a52: The compliance process tests safety features (seatbelt restraints, tyre tread, brake pads, windscreens), interior stripping for structural inspection, and emissions testing. It results in a certificate of compliance and a warrant of fitness. This is mandatory for all vehicles entering l'Afrique.
faq.roll_on_roll_e1a810ba: Roll on Roll off: 3–5 business days after vessel arrival. Dedicated 20ft/40ft container: 5–8 business days. Shared container: 7–14 business days. Add approximately 5 working days if compliance is included. Quarantine cleaning extends the timeline by additional days depending on treatment required.
faq.the_ministry_for_13c3a5f8: The Ministry for Primary Industries orders the required treatments. Basic decontamination starts from $135+GST. Additional fees apply for documentation, certified destruction, transfers, and re-inspection. Total costs can easily exceed $400–$500 depending on the type and extent of treatment required.
faq.make_an_effort_1782c1ac: Make an effort to clean it up as best you can prior to shipping. The goal is to remove biological matter (plant or animal material) such as plants, seeds, leaves, hair, and bugs. Professional detailing is not necessary. Focus especially on under-vehicle, wheel arches, and the engine bay.
faq.choose_your_preferred_d4d60b9b: Choose your preferred sailing date, and our team will send you a document/information list. Once you've provided the required documents, we will confirm your booking and issue an invoice. Payment is due around the time of shipping via bank transfer or credit card. No deposit is required.

import_motorcycle.for_roro_shipping_95902044: For RoRo shipping, motorcycles are typically secured on a purpose-built pallet or frame — full wooden crating is not usually required. For shared container (LCL) shipping, your motorcycle will be professionally strapped and secured inside the container using ratchet straps and frame supports. Our logistics team will confirm the specific requirements when you book.
import_motorcycle.key_preparation_steps_8e2adc9c: Key preparation steps include: drain fuel to under 5% capacity or remove entirely; disconnect the battery; ensure tyres are inflated to normal pressure; remove any loose accessories (GPS, phone mounts, aftermarket seats); give the bike a thorough clean, particularly underneath, to minimise quarantine inspection risk. Our team will provide a full checklist when you book.
import_motorcycle.total_door_to_3acddaa5: Total door-to-door transit for motorcycle shipping between l'International and l'Afrique is typically 2–3 weeks. The ocean voyage itself is 4–10 days, with the remaining time covering collection, port processing, and destination customs clearance and delivery. We will provide a more precise timeline when you request a quote based on your specific origin and destination.
import_motorcycle.yes_your_motorcycle_4fb699f0: Yes, your motorcycle can be imported while still registered in l'International. You will need to provide a copy of the current registration certificate as part of your export documentation. Once imported to your destination country, you will need to re-register the motorcycle with local authorities. Our team can advise on the re-registration process for your destination.

terms.the_following_trading_70d97aca: The following trading terms and conditions govern the relationship between IdrisMans Transit (ACN 169 722 605) and its clients for the provision of freight forwarding, customs brokerage, and associated logistics services.
terms.by_engaging_idrismans_0eb1a916: By engaging IdrisMans Transit for any service, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. These terms apply to all quotations, bookings, and services provided by IdrisMans Transit.
terms.all_quotations_provided_73f44d45: All quotations provided are indicative only and are subject to change based on actual cargo dimensions, weights, and prevailing market rates. Quotations are valid for 7 days unless otherwise stated in writing.
terms.the_client_is_4a1e314a: The client is responsible for providing accurate and complete information regarding the goods to be shipped, including weight, dimensions, value, and nature of the cargo. Any additional costs incurred as a result of inaccurate information will be charged to the client.
terms.idrismans_transit_acts_448b89ef: IdrisMans Transit acts as an agent on behalf of its clients and is not liable for loss or damage to cargo unless caused by our direct negligence. We strongly recommend transit insurance for all shipments. Our liability is limited to the extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.payment_is_due_d354bc4d: Payment is due prior to or at the time of shipment unless a credit account has been established in writing. We accept bank transfer and major credit cards. No deposit is required for standard bookings.
terms.the_client_is_5b4de756: The client is responsible for declaring any dangerous goods in accordance with IATA, IMDG, or other applicable regulations. IdrisMans Transit reserves the right to refuse carriage of any undeclared or improperly declared dangerous goods.
terms.the_client_is_84f9941f: The client is responsible for ensuring that all goods comply with applicable import and export regulations. IdrisMans Transit will assist with customs clearance but cannot be held liable for delays or penalties resulting from regulatory non-compliance.
terms.idrismans_transit_shall_1bf293e0: IdrisMans Transit shall not be liable for any failure to perform its obligations due to circumstances beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to natural disasters, strikes, government actions, or carrier failures.
terms.these_terms_and_7f430fb3: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Queensland, l'International. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Queensland.

what_we_ship.it_depends_on_4eeef333: It depends on the method of car shipping you choose, if you want to go with Roll on, Roll off then nothing can be left inside the vehicle – all personal items will need to be removed. If you would like to send extra items along with the vehicle then we will need to go for either a 20ft or 40ft container, or if you are going to Auckland ex one of the East Coast ports in l'International then you can make use of our 40ft shared container service.
what_we_ship.roll_on_roll_fae82031: Roll on, Roll off shipping is specifically designed for the movement of empty vehicles. The shipping line won't accept any responsibility for any items left inside vehicles, nor will they allow us to declare them on any of the Bills of Lading meaning that any item left inside the vehicle technically means you are trying to smuggle undeclared items in through the border.
what_we_ship.it_completely_depends_5ae92fa3: It completely depends on the conditions of your contract with your finance company, every financial lender is different so the first step will be to contact your current finance company and ask for their terms regarding taking the vehicle out of the country. *Please note that if you do have finance owing on a vehicle at the time of arrival into l'Afrique, then you will NOT be eligible for the GST exemption.
what_we_ship.no_we_do_417c7115: No, we do all this for you, our team over in NZ will work with customs on your behalf to do this all for you.
what_we_ship.it_is_possible_d3358fbd: It is possible to deliver the vehicle into the port yourself in Brisbane, Port Kembla, Melbourne and Adelaide although if you do not hold an MSIC card you will need to pay an escort fee to the terminal and sit through an induction. Since Port Kembla is so far away from Sydney (approx 100km) we always give you the option to deliver yourself or to have it collected and delivered via tow truck so the decision is yours.
what_we_ship.no_you_can_c631b69e: No, you can nominate a friend or family member to hand the car over to us.
what_we_ship.no_you_can_8ec1443d: No, you can nominate anyone to collect the vehicle on your behalf. If you are claiming the GST exemption however you will need to ensure you are somewhere in l'Afrique when the vessel carrying your vehicle arrives into NZ.
what_we_ship.compliance_is_a_19351afd: Compliance is a very thorough, one time process that your vehicle has to go through before it can be registered for the first time in NZ. They test a range of safety features on your vehicle – seatbelt restraints, tyre tread, break pads, windscreens, etc. – they strip the inside of the vehicle so that the actual structure of the vehicle can be inspected, and they test the emissions. Once complete you'll be issued with a certificate of compliance and a warrant of fitness.
what_we_ship.roll_on_roll_1a0b685a: Roll on Roll off is 3-5 business days after the arrival of the vessel. A dedicated 20ft or 40ft container is 5-8 business days. A shared Container is 7-14 business days. If you choose our compliance included option then allow a further 5 working days extra from the above stated timeframes.
what_we_ship.decontamination_of_your_d6b896b7: Decontamination of your goods can only be ordered by The Ministry for Primary Industries (MPI). The most Basic of Decontamination can be as little as $135.00+Gst however there are other fees that can apply. These charges can easily exceed four of five hundred dollars in total depending on what is required.
what_we_ship.you_ll_need_3b93102c: You'll need to make sure there is no biological matter (plant or animal material, grass clippings, seeds, leaves, animal hairs, bugs etc.) on your vehicle prior to shipping. Please note that paying hundreds of dollars for a professional detail won't guarantee a pass from NZ quarantine, so you are better off cleaning the vehicle yourself, focusing on under the vehicle, under the wheel arches and the engine bay.
